channel.title: Microsoft Learn - in Intune
channel.description: The latest updates from Microsoft Learn in Intune

item.title: Use Multi Admin Approval in Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Configure Multi Admin Approval to protect your tenant against the use of compromised administrative accounts in Intune.

item.title: Enable Unlicensed Administrator Access to Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to allow administrators to access Microsoft Intune without an Intune license by enabling unlicensed admin access in the admin center.

item.title: Use role-based access control (RBAC) and scope tags for distributed IT - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Use role-based access control (RBAC) and scope tags to filter configuration profiles to specific roles.

item.title: Install the Microsoft Tunnel VPN for Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Install and configure Microsoft Tunnel Gateway on a Linux server to support Intune managed cloud-based devices in connecting to your on-premises infrastructure.

item.title: Use Intune Suite add-on capabilities - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Microsoft Intune Suite unifies a series of mission-critical advanced endpoint management and security capabilities. The capabilities of the suite are integrated with Microsoft 365 and Microsoft Security across endpoint platforms for both cloud and on-premises co-managed devices.

item.title: Deploy Remote Help with Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Follow the steps to deploy Remote Help with Microsoft Intune on Windows, macOS, and Android Enterprise.

item.title: Configure Update Policies for Apple Devices - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to configure software update policies for Apple devices using Apple's Declarative Device Management (DDM) model. Improve security, reduce user disruption, and ensure compliance with reliable, automated updates across your organization.

item.title: Planning guide to move to Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Plan, design, implement, adopt, and move to Microsoft Intune. Get guidance and advice to determine goals, use-case scenarios and requirements, and create rollout and communication plans, support, testing, and validation plans.

item.title: Windows Update Management Overview - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to manage Windows updates with Intune. Control update settings, define rollout strategies, and ensure consistent device security across your organization.

item.title: Microsoft Intune Reports - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Intune provides specific report types with focused views that contain consistent and timely data.

item.title: Endpoint analytics overview - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Discover how Microsoft Intune endpoint analytics provides actionable insights to optimize device performance, improve user experience, and enable proactive IT troubleshooting.

item.title: Microsoft Intune Government Service overview - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn more about the Intune government service offerings and features. This article is designed to serve as an overview of the Microsoft Intune offering for government community cloud (GCC) High and United States Department of Defense (DoD) environments.

item.title: Configure Endpoint Analytics - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Step-by-step guide to configure endpoint analytics in Microsoft Intune, enroll devices, and manage data collection policies for device insights.

item.title: Protect data and devices with Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn about the Intune capabilities that can help you protect your devices and data against unauthorized access and other threats.

item.title: Deploy Windows Update Packages in Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to deploy a Windows update package (.msu file) in Intune.

item.title: Startup Performance Report in Endpoint Analytics - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how startup performance in Microsoft Intune endpoint analytics helps analyze boot times, identify issues, and optimize device performance.

item.title: Get started with macOS endpoints - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Microsoft Intune guide to set up and configure macOS devices from setup to creating policies and enrolling devices. You secure your corporate and organization-owned endpoints that are enrolled in Intune, and then deploy at scale with Apple Business Manager or Apple School Manager.

item.title: Scores, Baselines, and Insights in Endpoint Analytics - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Understand endpoint analytics scores, baselines, and insights in Microsoft Intune to measure and improve device performance metrics.

item.title: Set permissions to Managed Home Screen using Android Enterprise OEMConfig - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Add the Samsung Knox Service Plugin, Zebra OEMConfig Powered by MX, Legacy Zebra OEMConfig, and Honeywell UEMConnect apps to Intune, and use the app schemas to configure permissions for the Managed Home Screen (MHS) app on Android Enterprise devices.

item.title: Distributed IT with multiple admins - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn about scaling guidelines for Microsoft Intune when you have a large number of local admins who need to manage their own users/devices and policies within the same tenant. Use Microsoft Intune's Role Based Access Control to manage access.

item.title: Configure security, email, VPN, and Wi-Fi device configuration profiles - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Step 4 to deploy device configuration profiles as part of the minimum set of policies for your devices using Microsoft Intune. The starting point is to enable the firewall, install AV, scan for malware, install software updates, create a strong PIN policy, and create email, VPN, and Wi-Fi device configuration profiles.

item.title: Work From Anywhere Report in Endpoint Analytics - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Discover how the Work from Anywhere report in Microsoft Intune endpoint analytics provides insights into remote productivity, device readiness, and user experience.

item.title: Application Reliability Report in Endpoint Analytics - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Explore application reliability in Microsoft Intune endpoint analytics to analyze app crashes, improve user productivity, and enhance device performance.

item.title: Windows cloud configuration step by step guide - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Use this Windows 10/11 cloud configuration step-by-step setup guide to create your own cloud configuration deployment. You create the Microsoft Entra group and policies using Microsoft Intune, including the enrollment profile, compliance policy, and security baseline. You also deploy apps and resources that users need to do their jobs.

item.title: Tutorial-Get started with cloud-native Windows endpoints - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Set up secure cloud-native Windows endpoints that are Microsoft Entra joined, enrolled in Intune, and then deploy at scale with Windows Autopilot.

item.title: Troubleshooting Endpoint Analytics - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Troubleshoot Microsoft Intune endpoint analytics, including device enrollment issues, startup performance, and data collection problems.

item.title: Set up device management - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to configure the Intune service and set up the environment for education.

item.title: Endpoint Analytics in Microsoft Adoption Score - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how Microsoft Adoption Score integrates endpoint analytics to provide insights on device performance, startup performance, application reliability, and work-from-anywhere readiness for your organization.

item.title: Common Education Windows Update configuration - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn about common Windows Update configuration used by Education organizations in Intune.

item.title: Use the Vulnerability Remediation Agent to Manage Vulnerabilities - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to use the Vulnerability Remediation Agent in Microsoft Intune to identify, prioritize, and remediate security vulnerabilities across your managed devices.

item.title: Manage Windows Update Ring Policies - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn about Windows Update ring policies for Windows devices, how to create and manage them, and improve update deployment.

item.title: Update Rings Policy Settings - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Reference article that lists all the settings for Windows Update rings.

item.title: Expedite Policies for Windows Quality Updates - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to use expedite policies in Microsoft Intune to quickly deploy a specific Windows security update, bypass deferrals, and monitor installation status across devices.

item.title: Use Hotpatch With Windows Quality Updates - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how hotpatch works with Windows quality update policies in Microsoft Intune to install eligible security updates without requiring an immediate device restart.

item.title: Manage Windows quality updates - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to manage Windows quality updates in Microsoft Intune using quality update policies, expedited updates, and hotpatch to keep devices secure and compliant.

item.title: Software Update Errors and Descriptions - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Reference article with a list of the Software Update agent error code in Microsoft Intune, including the symbolic name and error description.

item.title: What's new in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Find out what's new in Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Admin checklist for Android software updates in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Guidance and advice for administrators that create and manage software updated for Android devices using Microsoft Intune. See tasks and settings that can manage updates on corporate owned Android Enterprise devices.

item.title: Admin checklist for iOS/iPadOS software updates in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Guidance and advice for administrators that create and manage software updated for iOS/iPadOS devices using Microsoft Intune. See sample policy for different industry scenarios, including shared devices, kiosk, manufacturing, and information worker.

item.title: Manage Windows Driver Updates - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to manage Windows driver updates using Intune driver update policies to keep Windows devices current and stable.

item.title: Reports for Windows Feature Update Policies - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn about the reports available for Windows feature update policies in Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Admin guide and checklist for macOS software updates - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Guidance and advice for administrators that create and manage software updates for macOS devices using Microsoft Intune. Use this article to help manage software updates on your organization-owned devices, including how to create policies, manage updates, and review update status.

item.title: Admin checklist for software updates on BYOD in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Guidance and advice for administrators that create and manage software updated for BYOD and personally owned devices using Microsoft Intune. See tasks and settings that can manage updates on personal devices on Android and iOS/iPadOS platforms.

item.title: Manage Windows Feature Updates - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to use Microsoft Intune policies to manage Windows feature updates.

item.title: Frequently Asked Questions About Windows Driver Update Policies - Microsoft Intune
item.description: This article provides answers to some frequently asked questions about Windows Driver Update Policies.

item.title: Use Microsoft Intune to manage software updates for supervised iOS/iPadOS devices - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Use Microsoft Intune to manage system updates for supervised iOS/iPadOS devices.

item.title: View Software Update Reports for Apple Devices - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Track Apple device update status in real time with Intune's declarative software update reporting. Learn how Microsoft Intune surfaces update changes directly from managed Apple devices.

item.title: Configure Rollout Options for Feature Update Policies - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Configure rollout options in feature update policies to control when Windows feature updates become available to devices and deploy updates gradually.

item.title: Zebra LifeGuard Over-the-Air Integration with Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Use Microsoft Intune to manage firmware updates for supported Zebra devices.

item.title: Enable Windows diagnostic data and license verification - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to enable Intune tenant settings to use Windows diagnostic data and verify Windows licenses required for dependent features.

item.title: Get Support for Endpoint Analytics - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Get support for Microsoft Intune endpoint analytics, including technical troubleshooting, online help, and product feedback options.

item.title: Configure Windows Driver Update Policies - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to create, approve, deploy, and pause Windows driver updates using Intune policies to keep Windows devices current and stable.

item.title: Configure Windows Feature Update Policies - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn about Windows feature update polies and how to manage them in Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Reports for Windows Quality Update Policies - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn about the reports available for Windows quality update policies in Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Endpoint Analytics Data Collection - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Understand endpoint analytics data collection in Microsoft Intune, including data flow, privacy, and how to stop gathering device data.

item.title: Android FOTA Updates - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Use Microsoft Intune to manage firmware updates on Android devices. A FOTA update can include software and security patches, feature updates, and other changes to the device's firmware.

item.title: Use Microsoft Intune policies to manage macOS software updates - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Use Microsoft Intune to manage system updates for supervised macOS devices.

item.title: Use Compatibility Reports for Windows Updates in Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Use compatibility reports for Windows devices in Intune to identify app and driver risks before deploying feature updates or update rings.

item.title: Reports for Windows Driver Update Policies reports - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to use Intune reports to monitor Windows driver updates for devices assigned to Windows Driver update policies.

item.title: Reports for Windows Update Ring Policies - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn about the reports available for Windows update ring policies in Intune. Discover how to access and interpret these reports to monitor update deployments.

item.title: Upgrade Devices to Windows 11 Using Feature Updates - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to upgrade Windows 10 devices to Windows 11 using feature updates in Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Microsoft Intune documentation - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Manage devices, apps, and security with Microsoft Intune.

item.title: In development - Microsoft Intune
item.description: This article describes Microsoft Intune features that are in development.

item.title: Mobile Application Management (MAM) for unenrolled devices in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Use mobile application management without enrollment to deploy apps, and protect organization data within the apps. Get an overview of the administrator and end user tasks for this enrollment option.

item.title: Microsoft Cloud PKI for Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: An overview of the Microsoft Cloud PKI service, available with Microsoft Intune Suite or as an Intune add-on.

item.title: Set the mobile device management authority - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn about how to set the mobile device management authority in Microsoft Intune and some key considerations.

item.title: Manage Apple Volume-Purchased Apps - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to sync apps you bought in volume through Apple Business Manager with Microsoft Intune. Then manage and track these apps on iOS/iPadOS and macOS devices.

item.title: Licenses available for Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Intune is available with these licenses

item.title: Add and Assign Managed Google Play Apps to Android Enterprise Devices - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Understand how to synchronize and assign apps to Android Enterprise devices from the Managed Google Play store.

item.title: Using Azure Virtual Desktop multi-session with Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Guidelines for using Azure Virtual Desktop multi-session with Microsoft Intune

item.title: Migration guide to Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Deployment guide to set up, onboard, or move to Intune. These steps include moving from partner MDM providers, using co-management, moving from on-premises group policy, and moving from Office 365 device management.

item.title: Configure device configuration profiles in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Add or configure a device configuration profile in Microsoft Intune. Select the platform type, configure the settings, and add a scope tag. Learn more about applicability rules, and the policy refresh cycle times.

item.title: Deployment guide to manage macOS devices in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn the recommended processes to manage macOS devices in Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Get started with Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: See an overview of the steps to start using Intune. Plan your move and deployment of Intune, determine your licensing needs and any platform requirements, use compliance and Conditional Access, deploy apps, create device configuration profiles, and enroll your devices to be managed. Get more information on mobile application management for BYOD or personal devices.

item.title: Deployment guide to manage iOS/iPadOS devices in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: A guide to managing iOS/iPadOS devices in Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Audit changes and events in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to review audit logs that record Microsoft Intune activities.

item.title: Manage and secure devices overview - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Get an overview of the concepts and features you should know when managing devices that access organization resources in Microsoft Intune. You can manage new and existing devices, including BYOD personal devices, check health compliance and view reports, configure device features, and secure devices using mobile threat solutions.

item.title: Jamf Managed Device Compliance with Microsoft Entra ID - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Integrate Jamf Pro with Microsoft Intune to report device compliance to Microsoft Entra ID.

item.title: Manually configure Jamf Pro integration with Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Manually configure Jamf Pro integration with Intune when you can't use the Jamf Cloud Connector.

item.title: Using Azure Virtual Desktop single-session with Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Guidelines for using Azure Virtual Desktop single-session with Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Deployment guide to manage Android devices in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn the recommended processes to manage Android devices in Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Configure Microsoft Cloud PKI root and issuing CA for Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Configure a root and issuing CA for the Microsoft Cloud PKI service.

item.title: Using Windows virtual machines with Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: This article describes the general guidelines for using Windows 10/11 virtual machines with Microsoft Intune

item.title: Manage and secure user and group identities overview - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Get an overview of the concepts and features you should know when managing identities in Microsoft Intune. Use existing users and groups, control access using RBAC, establish user affinity, and secure and authenticate users.

item.title: Enable eSIM data connections in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Add or use eSIM to get internet and data access using different data plans. In Intune, add or import activation codes, and then assign these activation codes using a configuration profile. You can also monitor the eSIM profiles and check the status of the eSIM-enabled devices.

item.title: Configure VPN settings for Apple devices in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Add or create a VPN configuration profile on iOS/iPadOS and macOS devices using virtual private network (VPN) configuration settings in Microsoft Intune. Configure the connection details, authentication methods, split tunneling, custom VPN settings with the identifier, key and value pairs, per-app VPN settings that include Safari URLs, and on-demand VPNs with SSIDs or DNS search domains, proxy settings to include a configuration script, IP or FQDN address, and TCP port.

item.title: Configure email settings in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Create an email device configuration profile in Microsoft Intune, and deploy this profile to Android device administrator, Android Enterprise, iOS, iPadOS, and Windows devices. Use email profiles to configure common email settings, including a Microsoft Exchange email server. Add authentication methods to connect to corporate email on devices you manage.

item.title: Bring your own certificate authority with Cloud PKI - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Create a Microsoft Cloud PKI BYOCA issuing CA in Intune and anchor it to an on-premises or private CA.

item.title: Mobile Application Management (MAM) and Android Enterprise Personally-Owned Work Profiles in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: See the available features when deciding to use Mobile Application Management (MAM) and/or Android Enterprise personally-owned work profiles for personal or BYOD Android devices in Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Add preference file settings to macOS devices in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Add an xml or plist file that includes key information about your app. Use a preference file device configuration profile to change key information in the property list file, and assign it to your macOS devices in Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Deployment guide for Windows device management - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Use our platform deployment guide to set up Windows device management in Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Endpoint management services and solutions at Microsoft - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Microsoft Intune is a family of on-premises products and cloud services. It includes Intune, Configuration Manager, co-management, Endpoint Analytics, Windows Autopilot, and the admin center to manage cloud devices and on on-premises.

item.title: Microsoft Intune cloud PKI fundamentals - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Describes fundamentals for Microsoft Intune cloud PKI.

item.title: Manage Specialty devices with Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: This article provides information about specialty devices and how can you manage them with Microsoft Intune

item.title: Configure the Jamf Pro Cloud Connector to integrate Jamf Pro with Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Use the Jamf Cloud Connector to integrate Jamf Pro with Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Configure Email settings for iOS/iPadOS devices in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: See a list of all the email settings you can configure and add to iOS and iPadOS devices in Microsoft Intune, including using Exchange servers, and getting attributes from Microsoft Entra ID. You can also enable SSL, authenticate users with certificates or username/password, and synchronize email on iOS/iPadOS devices using device configuration profiles in Microsoft Intune.

item.title: eSIM configuration of a download server - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn about configuration of an eSIM Download Server from Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Use Zebra Mobility Extensions on Android devices in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Use Microsoft Intune to manage and use Zebra devices running Android with Zebra Mobility Extensions (MX). See all the steps, including install the Company Portal app, sideload the app, assign device administrator role, create a StageNow profile, and more.

item.title: Create a policy using settings catalog in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Use settings catalog in Microsoft Intune to configure thousands of settings for Windows 10/11, iOS/iPadOS, macOS, and Android client devices, including Microsoft Office apps, Microsoft Edge, administrative templates (ADMX), and more. Add these settings in a device configuration profile to secure devices, and control different programs and features. Use Microsoft Copilot to get What If analysis, and learn more about each setting.

item.title: Microsoft Intune servicing information and details - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn more about the frequency of the Microsoft Intune service updates, the release cadence, and how to check your tenant release version.
